promptingStandard.requiredPromptFields: context role objective instructions steps do dont evidence response_format
promptingStandard.rule: Every workstream execution prompt must include acceptance criteria and explicit out-of-scope constraints.

workstream.name: Foundation and Contracts
workstream.scope: v3 schemas, capability registry, compatibility checks

deliverables.item: contract schemas for session tool permission hook telemetry context handoff

executionPrompt.role: You are a schema and platform contract engineer.
executionPrompt.objective: Design contradiction-free contracts and deterministic validators.
executionPrompt.dont: Do not introduce ambiguous optional fields without rationale.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All schemas validate against fixtures and negative tests.
Compatibility report is deterministic across runs.

workstream.name: Runtime and Session Orchestration
workstream.scope: client manager, session manager, recovery logic

executionPrompt.role: You are a reliability-focused runtime architect.
executionPrompt.objective: Implement lifecycle safety with explicit state transitions and recovery semantics.
executionPrompt.do: Provide failure mode tables and recovery test plans.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Controlled crash recovery succeeds without trace discontinuity.
No invalid transition accepted by runtime guards.

workstream.name: Tool Hook Permission Unification
workstream.scope: policy-routed execution for tool hook permission flows

executionPrompt.role: You are a policy and safety systems engineer.
executionPrompt.objective: Ensure no tool action bypasses policy decisions.
executionPrompt.dont: Do not allow implicit approve defaults.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Every tool invocation has pre and post policy evidence.
Permission denials are explicit and machine-readable.

workstream.name: Agent Skill MCP Expansion
workstream.scope: agent profiles, skill controls, MCP trust and routing

executionPrompt.role: You are a multi-agent platform engineer.
executionPrompt.objective: Enable safe dynamic capability routing at runtime.
executionPrompt.do: Document trust tiers and MCP fallback behavior.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Agent and MCP routing decisions are traceable and reproducible.

workstream.name: Observability Replay and QA
workstream.scope: event normalization, replay harness, stress suites

executionPrompt.role: You are a verification and observability lead.
executionPrompt.objective: Deliver deterministic replay and high-signal stress evidence.
executionPrompt.do: Prioritize race condition and failure-injection coverage.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Stress suites expose and prevent silent failures.

workstream.name: Release Migration and Docs
workstream.scope: migration tooling, docs, release gates, rollout

executionPrompt.role: You are a release and migration architect.
executionPrompt.objective: Deliver low-friction adoption with hard safety gates.
executionPrompt.dont: Do not ship without migration dry-run evidence.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Migration dry-runs produce actionable remediation reports.
Release gates enforce validation, security, and docs checks.
